name: meta-eval run appends a structured result entry to HISTORY.md per quarterly cadence
command: mkdir -p meta-eval && : > meta-eval/HISTORY.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/meta-eval/run.sh" --target known-good --findings-stub p0=2,p1_absence=0.95 --history meta-eval/HISTORY.md --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q '2026-05-13' meta-eval/HISTORY.md && grep -q 'p0=2' meta-eval/HISTORY.md && echo ok 1>&2
